extortion.description: Alpha Oil is a family run business based in Toronto servicing the Greater Toronto area. We are a full service fuel company offering a wide selection of quality, brand name products and services to businesses and homes. Our products include low sulfur clear diesel, coloured diesel, furnace oil, stove oil, gasoline, and a full range of lubricants. We have a 24 hour cardlock depot offering clear & coloured diesel. We have successfully built a business based on a solid commitment to service. Alpha Oil is a proud member of GTSWCA, TCA and ACMO. ===> [redacted]
